raw:
{
  "insight_updates": [
    {
      "op": "update",
      "id": "[ins_glaze]",
      "key": null,
      "reason": "same slip repeats across wet glazing attempts",
      "text": "applies glaze while still too wet; causes crawling",
      "evidence": [
        "att_1",
        "att_3",
        "att_4"
      ]
    },
    {
      "op": "update",
      "id": "[ins_center]",
      "key": null,
      "reason": "bracing arm and rushing caused loss of centering",
      "text": "losses center when bracing left hand; rushes multi-step problems",
      "evidence": [
        "att_5",
        "att_6",
        "att_7"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "strategy": {
    "difficulty": "intermediate",
    "scaffolding": "high",
    "reason": "centering failures show rushing despite solid glaze content; raising support aids speed without lowering difficulty to abandon the goal."
  },
  "plan_revision": null,
  "questions": [],
  "topic_retirements": [],
  "journal": "updated both insights with repeated failure patterns in recent attempts; increased scaffolding high due to visible rushing on centering"
}
